observations.description: The room is empty, with light wooden floors and white walls. A large black board is on the right wall, and a window with bars is on the left wall. There are some colorful decorations on the right side of the wall.

A teacher and five children enter the room. The children are wearing light-colored dresses and one boy is wearing a striped shirt and red pants. They are walking around the room, some of them running. The teacher is carrying a white bottle and then puts it on the floor. Another teacher enters the room carrying a white basket and puts it on the floor near the blackboard.

The first teacher is now carrying a blue blanket and puts it on the floor. The children are still walking around the room. The teacher then puts another blue blanket on the floor. The children start sitting on the blankets. The second teacher is now carrying two wooden tables and puts them on the floor.

The children are sitting on the blankets, and the teacher is giving them papers. The children are now doing some exercises, raising their arms up and down. The second teacher is carrying a wooden chair and puts it on the floor.

The children are sitting on the blankets, and the teacher is asking them questions. The second teacher is carrying another wooden chair and puts it on the floor. The children are now sitting at the wooden tables and coloring.
The children are sitting at the wooden tables and coloring. The teachers are walking around the room.
